insights.headline: GA4 Key Events live for the first time
insights.body: Was 0 at May 8 audit. Now 5. The May 9 GA4 Event - generate_lead tag deploy (GTM Version 8) is producing real signal.

insights.headline: Funnel fix is the bottleneck
insights.body: Tag pipeline verified end-to-end May 9. The reason form conversions stay at 0 is the funnel — only ~3 of 62 paid sessions reach /free-estimate/ in 30 days.

insights.headline: Apply 75+ negative keywords

insights.headline: Active campaign at $11.95/day vs $60 cap
insights.body: Bid setting limited warning means Smart Bidding can't price into competitive Madison auctions.
